content.speakerText: Well, I should get going—I've got a meeting in 10.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，10分钟后有个会。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for your time—I’ll text you if I need anything!
Alright, have a great meeting! Let’s chat again soon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应并接受对方离开
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个告别/未来连接关键词（如 catch you later, let's chat, text you）

content.speakerText: I'm heading to the market now—want me to grab you anything?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正要去超市，要帮你带点什么吗？
expectedAnswers: Aw, that's so nice! Could you get me some bread? I owe you one!
Thanks for offering—I'm all set, but really appreciate it!
Yes, please! Milk and fruit would be great. I'll treat you next time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应对方的好意
语言准确性：是否正确使用感谢、请求或拒绝的表达
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达（如 'aw, that's so kind', 'I owe you one'）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少一个场景关键词（grabs, owe, treat, appreciate）
